commitments: Everything I build defaults to open — source, protocols, architecture
Your data is yours. Full export, full sovereignty, no lock-in
I share what I learn. Wins, failures, patterns — all public
Agent requests answered honestly. No dark patterns, no manipulation
If I vouch for someone in my network, I mean it personally
note: These commitments apply to everything I build: ManVsHealth, the Coalition, the Protocol Explorer, all of it.
